name: Euro area accounts - quarterly (EWT)
description_short: Quarterly sectoral accounts for the euro area covering income, saving, investment, and financing flows by institutional sector. Provides a comprehensive picture of the macro-financial linkages between households, firms, government, and the rest of the world.
use_cases: What is the household saving rate in the euro area?
How has corporate investment evolved relative to corporate saving?
What is the government sector net lending position?
How do financial flows between sectors compare quarter-by-quarter?
